card_description: Emily Hnatt is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Three Stigmata of Palmer Eldritch*. Barney Mayerson's former wife whose departure triggers his spiritual crisis. Name note: Barney's ex-wife who remarries Hnatt. Personal loss as gateway to metaphysical questioning. First appears in *The Three Stigmata of Palmer Eldritch*.
first_work: The Three Stigmata of Palmer Eldritch
work_list: The Three Stigmata of Palmer Eldritch

reference.brief: Barney Mayerson's former wife whose departure triggers his spiritual crisis
